title: [Vic's Point Blank] MCR Horizon's Lord
description: A Vic's Point Blank content pack that adds the MCR Horizon's Lord, an anti material rifle.
body:
This is a Vic's Point Blank content pack that adds an anti material rifle known as the MCR Horizon's Lord.

For other content pack creators wanting to make attachments work with this, the rifle only supports rifle muzzles and sniper scopes (rf_muzzle/rf_suppressors & snipers_sights attachment groups)

This project was commissioned by Saiyunn
